text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Ohhhh～～～～! They're so cute, you're good at this.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Hahah, since you got so many, I might 
pop some in the dormitory common room.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
The plushies are going to become a lively 
bunch. Any classmate who wants one can 
grab one too.
